issues_found: Source is a listing_page per source metadata; Rule 5 mandates rejection for listing_page type
Source contains only dates and titles of FOMC releases, no substantive statement text
event_type set to 'fomc_statement' is misleading—source contains no FOMC statement content
Published_at (2020-01-29) incorrectly reflects earliest listed date rather than source publication date
No specific policy decisions, vote counts, or forward guidance can be extracted from this index
No archival value as substantive content—only navigation metadata
human_review_reason: The generated record's own analysis correctly identifies this as a non-archivable listing page. The record's reasoning is sound and thorough; no additional human review needed. The recommendation to reject aligns with verification standards for container/listing pages.

corrected_fields.summary: This Federal Reserve page is an index listing all 13 FOMC statements and projection releases from 2020. The page does not contain the substantive text of individual statements; it only provides dates and titles with links. Individual FOMC statement pages must be crawled separately for archiveable content.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This listing page is not itself archiveable. Researchers must access individual FOMC statement pages to retrieve the actual policy content (rate decisions, forward guidance, balance sheet details). The 2020 FOMC statements contain critical macro catalyst information including emergency rate cuts and QE programs.
